_comment: Acreage Brothers (fix-and-flip) recognition for the daily CEO brief. With Collin's acreagebros.com mailboxes auto-forwarding into collinschwartz1@gmail.com, this list lets intel.mjs ATTRIBUTE that mail as Acreage and elevate settlement/closing statements so they land as an action ('update flip tracker + file statement') instead of buried fyi. Add title companies / counterparties as new deals close.
